title: Personal Portfolio
description: A portfolio built to document projects and major milestones in my coding journey.

title: ETLR Hackathon - CareerFlow Pipeline
description: Built an automated job matching and CV optimisation pipeline using ETLR's event ingestion engine. Integrated a Discord bot UI with Claude (Anthropic API) to deliver daily tailored job alerts, generate custom CVs, and dynamically upgrade resumes to beat ATS systems.

title: Allacrity Hackathon
description: As a team, we built a chrome extension to intercept web traffic and alert users of professionally unsafe AI tools.

title: UKSEDS Rover Trials Project
description: Built a prototype rover capable of traversing Martian terrain. Included streaming live video food.

title: NLP Hackathon
description: Utilised an OpenAI API to create a tool that analyses public sentiment of various companies to return graphs and investment recommendations.

title: CherryOnTop Desserts POS System
description: My first full-stack project, originally built as a complete Point of Sale (POS) and inventory system for a dessert shop. This repository serves as a public-facing demonstration of the e-commerce storefront.
